items.key: (ma_dvcs = '{$%c[ma_dvcs]}') and (@@admin = 1 or bo_phan in (select a.ma_bp from hrbp a, @@sysDatabaseName..hrquyenbp b where dbo.ff_Inlist(a.bp_ref, b.r_access2) = 1 and b.user_id = @@userID)) and status = '1'
items.check: (ma_dvcs = '{$%c[ma_dvcs]}') and (@@admin = 1 or bo_phan in (select a.ma_bp from hrbp a, @@sysDatabaseName..hrquyenbp b where dbo.ff_Inlist(a.bp_ref, b.r_access2) = 1 and b.user_id = @@userID))

command.text: declare @message nvarchar(4000), @lock nvarchar(4000), @unitName nvarchar(1023) select @lock = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Đã khóa số liệu, kiểm tra lại ngày giới hạn hoặc ngày khóa sổ' else N'Data is locked, check locked date again' end select @unitName = case when @@language = 'V' then ten_dvcs else ten_dvcs2 end from dmdvcs where ma_dvcs = @@unit select @message = 'this._unitCode=''' + @@unit + ''';this._unitName=''' + replace(replace(isnull(@unitName, ''), '\', '\\'), '''', '\''') + ''';init$AdjustDeductablePIT(this);' &CommandWhenBalanceBeforeEdit; if @@view = 0 begin if @@action = 'Edit' begin if exists(select 1 from dmstt where dbo.ff_GetStartDateOfYear(@nam + 1) <= ngay_ks) begin select '' as script, @lock as message return end end end select @message as message return

declare @message nvarchar(4000), @lock nvarchar(4000) select @lock = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Đã khóa số liệu, kiểm tra lại ngày giới hạn hoặc ngày khóa sổ' else N'Data is locked, check locked date again' end select @message = 'init$AdjustDeductablePIT(this);' &CommandWhenBalanceBeforeEdit; if @@action = 'Edit' begin if exists(select 1 from dmstt where dbo.ff_GetStartDateOfYear(@nam + 1) <= ngay_ks) begin select 'loai_tn' as field, @lock as message return end end select @message as message return
select ma_nv, rtrim(ho_nv) + ' ' + ten_nv as ho_ten from hrnv where stt_rec = @stt_rec

declare @$exists nvarchar(512), @$valid nvarchar(512), @$lock nvarchar(512), @$recordHasBeenChanged nvarchar(512) select @$exists = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Đơn vị %s1, năm %s2, loại thu nhập %s3 và mã nhân viên %s4 đã có trong danh mục điều chỉnh thuế khấu trừ.' else N'The record consisting of Unit %s1, Year %s2, Income Type %s3 and Employee %s4 already exists.' end select @$valid = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Dữ liệu không hợp lệ' else N'Invalid Data' end select @$lock = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Đã khóa số liệu, kiểm tra lại ngày giới hạn hoặc ngày khóa sổ' else N'Data is locked, check locked date again' end select @$recordHasBeenChanged = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Bản ghi hiện thời đã được sửa hoặc xóa bởi người sử dụng khác.' else N'This item has been modified or deleted by another user.' end

if exists(select 1 from dmstt where dbo.ff_GetStartDateOfYear(@nam + 1) <= ngay_ks) begin select 'loai_tn' as field, @$lock as message return end if exists(select * from @@table where ma_dvcs = @ma_dvcs and nam = @nam and stt_rec = @stt_rec and loai_tn = @loai_tn) begin select 'loai_tn' as field, replace(replace(replace(replace(@$exists, '%s1', rtrim(@ma_dvcs)), '%s2', rtrim(@nam)), '%s3', rtrim(@loai_tn)), '%s4', rtrim(@stt_rec)) as message return end select @datetime0 = getdate(), @datetime2 = getdate(), @user_id0 = @@userID, @user_id2 = @@userID

if exists(select 1 from dmstt where dbo.ff_GetStartDateOfYear(@nam + 1) <= ngay_ks) begin select 'loai_tn' as field, @$lock as message return end if not exists(select * from @@table where ma_dvcs = $ma_dvcs.OldValue and nam = $nam.OldValue and stt_rec = $stt_rec.OldValue and loai_tn = $loai_tn.OldValue) begin select @$recordHasBeenChanged as message return end if @ma_dvcs <> $ma_dvcs.OldValue or @nam <> $nam.OldValue or @stt_rec <> $stt_rec.OldValue or @loai_tn <> $loai_tn.OldValue begin if exists(select * from @@table where ma_dvcs = @ma_dvcs and nam = @nam and stt_rec = @stt_rec and loai_tn = @loai_tn) begin select 'loai_tn' as field, replace(replace(replace(replace(@$exists, '%s1', rtrim(@ma_dvcs)), '%s2', rtrim(@nam)), '%s3', rtrim(@loai_tn)), '%s4', rtrim(@stt_rec)) as message return end end
update @@table set datetime2 = getdate(), user_id2 = @@userID where ma_dvcs = @ma_dvcs and nam = @nam and stt_rec = @stt_rec and loai_tn = @loai_tn

&CommandWhenBalanceBeforeDelete;
if exists(select 1 from dmstt where dbo.ff_GetStartDateOfYear(@nam + 1) <= ngay_ks) begin select @$lock as message return end

action.text: if exists(select 1 from hrnv where ma_nv = @ma_nv) select stt_rec from hrnv where ma_nv = @ma_nv else select '' return
